claims.summary: The WebSocket receive loop awaits telemetry handling before reading the next message.
claims.disposition: Verified in current source as a real sequencing property.

claims.summary: Telemetry handling includes artifact scans and synchronous persistence work.
claims.disposition: Verified the current handler path without inferring observed runtime delay.

claims.summary: Existing integration timing does not cover all post-lock persistence latency.
claims.disposition: Verified the measurement boundary: prewrite, lock wait, and lock hold do not exhaust the full handler path.

claims.summary: Receive-loop delay should be observed under natural load with exact identity.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded timing evidence; no contention, oversized frame, or ping failure will be induced.

claims.summary: Telemetry handling should be moved off the receive loop immediately.
claims.disposition: Routed to a non-live architecture proposal; implementation requires ordering, backpressure, protocol, and deployment review.
